title: High significance detection at 4.8 GHz of the radio halo in the Coma galaxy cluster with the Sardinia Radio Telescope
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables; accepted for publication in MNRAS
summary: We present the results of observations of the radio halo in the Coma galaxy cluster at 4.8 GHz performed with the Sardinia Radio Telescope. The radio halo in this cluster is detected for the first time at this frequency with a statistical significance higher than $3σ$. After the removal of the Radio Frequency Interference and of the discrete sources contribution, and after the correction for the Sunyaev-Zel'dovich effect, we estimate a flux density of $61\pm11$ mJy, higher than the value previously reported in literature at this frequency. By using the value we obtained, it is possible to estimate an integrated spectral index between 4.8 and 6.6 GHz of $α\sim1.17$, where $F(ν)\propto ν^{-α}$, indicating a possible higher-frequency slowdown of the spectral steepening observed between 1.4 and 4.8 GHz. Such a spectral behavior is compatible with turbulent re-acceleration if the seed electrons have a spectrum extending up to high energies, as in the case of continuous injection by hadronic interactions or dark matter annihilation. We also report the detection at 4.8 GHz of a polarized spot inside the halo, without an evident counterpart, already detected at 6.6 GHz.

AI.tldr: 首次在4.8GHz频率上以高于3σ的统计显著性探测到Coma星系团射电晕，测得通量密度61±11 mJy，比先前文献值更高，表明在高频段可能存在谱陡变减缓现象。
AI.motivation: 研究Coma星系团射电晕在4.8GHz的高频特性，验证先前观测结果，探索射电晕的谱指数变化特征及其物理机制。
AI.method: 使用Sardinia射电望远镜在4.8GHz进行观测，去除射频干扰和离散源贡献，校正Sunyaev-Zel'dovich效应，计算通量密度和谱指数。
AI.result: 首次在4.8GHz以>3σ显著性探测到射电晕，通量密度61±11 mJy，4.8-6.6GHz积分谱指数α~1.17，在晕内探测到偏振斑点。
AI.conclusion: 观测到的谱行为与湍流再加速模型兼容，需要种子电子具有延伸到高能区的能谱，可能来源于强子相互作用或暗物质湮灭的连续注入。

title: Early Results from the Coma Legacy IFU Survey (CLIFS): Ram Pressure Induced Shocks and Ionization in Jellyfish Tails
summary: Jellyfish galaxies, which exhibit tails of gas opposite to their direction of motion, are a galaxy population showcasing the most extreme effects of ram pressure stripping (RPS). We present the emission line properties of a preliminary sample of five jellyfish galaxies in the Coma cluster, observed with the WEAVE Large-IFU as part of the Coma Legacy IFU Survey (CLIFS). When complete, CLIFS will form a sample of 29 jellyfish galaxies in Coma, selected based on the presence of one-sided tails in the radio continuum, enabling a comprehensive picture of the effects of ram pressure on galaxies in the Coma cluster. We extract emission line properties and confirm consistency between disk fluxes measured from WEAVE and MaNGA for galaxies with overlapping disk coverage between surveys. Comparing resolved radio and H$α$-based star formation rates, we find that, in contrast to the disk, the dominant source of tail emission is not star formation. We find evidence for diffuse ionized gas excited by RPS-driven shocks in the tails, as indicated by: (1) LINER-like tail emission with the [OI]/H$α$ BPT diagnostic; (2) enhanced [OII]/H$α$ ratios in the tails relative to the disks; and (3) similarly elevated emission line velocities and velocity dispersions in the tails with respect to the disks. These results demonstrate that ram-pressure-driven shocks dominate the ionized emission in jellyfish galaxy tails.

AI.tldr: 对彗星状星系（jellyfish galaxies）的初步研究显示，其尾部电离辐射主要来自冲压剥离驱动的激波，而非恒星形成活动。
AI.motivation: 彗星状星系是受冲压剥离效应影响最显著的星系类型，研究其尾部气体性质有助于理解冲压剥离对星系演化的极端影响。
AI.method: 使用WEAVE大积分视场单元对后发座星系团中5个彗星状星系进行观测，提取发射线性质，比较射电和Hα基恒星形成率，分析尾部气体电离机制。
AI.result: 尾部发射主要不是恒星形成；尾部显示LINER类发射特征；[OII]/Hα比值在尾部相对盘面增强；尾部发射线速度和速度弥散度与盘面类似但有所提升。
AI.conclusion: 彗星状星系尾部的电离发射主要由冲压剥离驱动的激波主导，而非恒星形成活动。

authors: J. M. G. H. J. de Jong
title: The LOFAR Two-metre Sky Survey: VII. Third Data Release
comment: 15 figures, 2 tables and 22 pages. The catalogues, images and uv-data associated with this data release are publicly available via https://lofar-surveys.org/
summary: We present the third data release of the LOFAR Two-metre Sky Survey (LoTSS-DR3). The survey images cover 88% of the northern sky and were created from 12,950 hrs of data (18.6 PB) accumulated over 10.5 years. The images were produced through direction-independent and direction-dependent calibration pipelines that correct for instrumental effects as well as spatially and temporally varying ionospheric distortions. In our 120-168 MHz continuum mosaic images with an angular resolution of 6 arcsec (9 arcsec below declination 10$^\circ$) we catalogue 13,667,877 sources, formed from 16,943,656 Gaussian components. The scatter in the astrometric precision approximately follows the expected noise-like behaviour but with an additional systematic component of at least 0.24 arcsec that is likely due to calibration imperfections. The random flux density scale error is 6%, while the systematic offset was previously shown to be within 2%. The median sensitivity of our mosaics is 92$μ$Jy beam$^{-1}$. Completeness simulations, accounting for realistic source models, time- and bandwidth-smearing effects, and astrometric errors, indicate that we detect more than 95% of compact sources with integrated flux densities exceeding 9 times the local root mean square (RMS) noise. However, the recovered source counts in a particular integrated flux density bin do not match the injected counts until flux densities exceed 45 times the local RMS noise. The Euclidean-normalised differential source counts derived from the survey constrain the radio source population over five orders of magnitude and are in good agreement with previous deep and wide-area surveys. All data products are publicly available, including catalogues, individual-field Stokes I, Q, U, and V images, mosaicked Stokes I images, and $uv$ data with associated direction-dependent calibration solutions.

AI.tldr: LOFAR巡天第三版数据发布，覆盖北天88%区域，包含1360万射电源，提供高分辨率射电图像和完整数据产品
AI.motivation: 发布LOFAR两米巡天第三版数据，提供迄今为止最全面的低频射电巡天数据，覆盖北天大部分区域，为射电天文学研究提供重要资源
AI.method: 使用方向独立和方向依赖校准流程处理12,950小时观测数据，校正仪器效应和电离层畸变，生成120-168 MHz连续谱图像，角分辨率6角秒
AI.result: 发布包含13,667,877个射电源的星表，中值灵敏度92μJy/beam，定位精度存在0.24角秒系统误差，流量密度随机误差6%，系统偏移小于2%
AI.conclusion: LOFAR巡天第三版数据提供了高质量的低频射电观测数据，源计数与先前巡天结果一致，所有数据产品已公开，为射电天文学研究提供重要资源

title: PDRs4All XXI. JWST-NIRCam Photometric properties of protoplanetary disks in the Orion Nebula Cluster
summary: The Orion Nebula Cluster (ONC) provides the closest example of star and planet formation in highly irradiated environments. It is a key region to study how UV radiation from massive stars drive mass-loss in protoplanetary disks through photoevaporation. Far-UV photons (6<E<13.6 eV) heat up the gas of the disk, forming a photodissociation region (PDRs). We use the NIRCam images from the PDRs4All program combined with those of the GTO program 1256 to extract key information on ONC disks. Specifically, the radii of the disks observed in silhouette against the bright background , the presence and positions of the dissociation fronts (DFs), the presence and positions of ionization fronts (IFs), intensities of Pa $α$ lines, and their near IR SEDs. From those, we construct a typology for ONC disks: Type I show an IF and DF nearly merged at the disk surface; Type II have their DFs at the disk surface and IFs at a distance of several 10s of astronomical units from the disk; and Type III also have their DF at the disk surface, but show no IF. For all disks, we find that PAH emission traces the PDR. We establish that the SEDs of candidate JuMBOs observed as part of the PDRs4All program are similar to the SEDs of Type III ONC disks except for JuMBO24, which is of Type I or II. A detailed look at this SED shows it is compatible with a young low mass binary star with an unresolved ionized disk : a microproplyd binary. We observe that the disk radius of ONC disks increases with increasing projected distance to the ionizing source interpreted as evidence of the truncation of the disks by the photoevaporation. The disk radii measured at IR wavelengths appear larger than at millimeter wavelengths, interpreted as evidence of the dust radial segregation within the disks. The thermal pressure within the PDRs of ONC disk increases with the FUV radiation field, but with a flatter slope.

AI.tldr: 该研究分析了猎户座星云团原行星盘的光致蒸发效应，通过近红外观测建立了三类盘型分类，发现盘半径随距电离源距离增加而增大，表明光致蒸发对盘的截断作用。
AI.motivation: 猎户座星云团是研究高辐射环境下恒星和行星形成的关键区域，特别是大质量恒星紫外辐射如何通过光致蒸发驱动原行星盘质量损失的过程。
AI.method: 使用PDRs4All项目和GTO项目1256的NIRCam图像，提取盘半径、解离前沿和电离前沿位置、Paα线强度以及近红外SED等关键信息，构建ONC盘的类型学分类。
AI.result: 建立了三类ONC盘分类：I型（IF和DF在盘表面几乎合并）、II型（DF在盘表面，IF在数十AU外）、III型（DF在盘表面但无IF）。发现PAH发射追踪PDR，盘半径随距电离源距离增加而增大，表明光致蒸发截断作用，红外波长测量的盘半径比毫米波长大，表明盘内尘埃径向分离。
AI.conclusion: 研究证实了紫外辐射对原行星盘的光致蒸发效应，建立了基于观测特征的盘分类系统，为理解高辐射环境下行星形成过程提供了重要观测依据。

title: Little Red Dots as Globular Clusters in Formation
summary: Little Red Dots (LRDs), among the most enigmatic high-redshift discoveries by JWST, are commonly believed to be powered by accreting supermassive black holes. Here, we explore the possibility that these sources are globular clusters in formation, with rest-frame UV arising from a very young stellar population and rest-frame optical from a short-lived supermassive ($>10^4$ M$_\odot$) star. The spectral profiles of LRDs are broadly consistent with this scenario, though the observed temperatures and bolometric luminosities favor emission reprocessed by optically thick, continuum-driven winds not fully captured by current models. The LRD $z\sim5-7$ UV luminosity function naturally evolves, under standard evolutionary and mass-loss prescriptions, into a present-day mass function with a turnover at $\log_{10}(M_\ast$/$M_\odot)=5.3$ and an exponential cutoff at high masses, consistent with local globular-cluster populations. We estimate the total present-day number density of LRDs formed across all redshifts to be $\approx0.3$ Mpc$^{-3}$, similar to local globular clusters. The observed LRD redshift range matches the age distribution of metal-poor globular clusters, without current LRD counterparts to the metal-rich population. If LRDs are globular clusters in formation, we predict chemical abundance patterns characteristic of multiple stellar populations, including enhanced He and N, and potential Na-O and Al-Mg anti-correlations. These results offer a local perspective to explore this surprisingly abundant population of distant sources, and a potential new window into extreme stellar astrophysics in the early Universe.

AI.tldr: JWST发现的"小红点"可能是正在形成的球状星团，而非超大质量黑洞，其光谱特征与年轻恒星群体和超大质量恒星相符，且演化结果与本地球状星团质量函数一致。
AI.motivation: JWST发现的高红移"小红点"通常被认为是超大质量黑洞驱动的，但本文探索这些源可能是正在形成的球状星团，为理解这一神秘天体提供新视角。
AI.method: 通过分析LRDs的光谱特征，将其与年轻恒星群体和超大质量恒星模型进行比较，并模拟从红移z~5-7到现在的演化过程，检验其与本地球状星团质量函数的匹配度。
AI.result: LRDs的光谱特征与球状星团形成场景基本一致；其UV光度函数演化后与本地球状星团质量函数相符（转折点在log10(M*/M⊙)=5.3）；总数量密度约0.3 Mpc^-3，与本地球状星团相似；红移范围与贫金属球状星团年龄分布匹配。
AI.conclusion: LRDs可能是早期宇宙中正在形成的球状星团，这为理解这一丰富的高红移天体提供了新框架，并预测了多星族化学丰度模式，为极端恒星天体物理研究开辟了新窗口。

title: SPT-CL J0417-4748: A Deep Chandra Study of a Relaxed Galaxy Cluster Without Central Star Formation
comment: 14 pages, 9 figures, Accepted for publication in ApJ
summary: We present an in-depth Chandra X-ray analysis of the galaxy cluster SPT-CL J0417$-$4748 (hereafter SPT J0417), at z = 0.58, with a focus on its thermodynamic properties and the apparent absence of central star formation. Utilizing a total Chandra exposure of 103 ks, we find that the large-scale X-ray morphology is consistent with a dynamically relaxed, cool-core system. The intracluster medium (ICM) shows a central density of 0.08+/-0.01 cm^{-3}, a central pseudo-entropy of 26^{+6}_{-5} keVcm^{2} and a central cooling time of 515^{+96}_{-75} Myr, values typical of massive cool-core clusters. Despite these conditions, no evidence of recent or ongoing star formation is detected in the brightest cluster galaxy (BCG). Spectral energy distribution (SED) fitting of DES photometry indicates that the bulk of the stellar population formed at z~1.25, with no significant star formation over the past ~3 Gyr, while optical spectra from Magellan show no [O II] emission. Complementary ASKAP radio and Spitzer infrared data indicate a lack of strong current AGN activity in the BCG. SPT J0417 exemplifies massive, relaxed, cool-core clusters in which cooling and star formation appear almost completely quenched, providing valuable insights into how AGN feedback regulates the long-term thermal balance of the intracluster medium.

AI.tldr: 对z=0.58的星系团SPT J0417的Chandra X射线分析显示，这是一个动力学松弛的冷核系统，具有典型的冷核团特征，但中央星系没有恒星形成活动，AGN活动也很弱。
AI.motivation: 研究SPT J0417星系团的热力学性质，特别关注其作为冷核系统却缺乏中央恒星形成的现象，以了解AGN反馈如何调节星系团内介质的长期热平衡。
AI.method: 使用103 ks的Chandra X射线观测分析热力学性质；结合DES测光数据进行SED拟合确定恒星形成历史；利用Magellan光学光谱检测[O II]发射线；通过ASKAP射电和Spitzer红外数据评估AGN活动。
AI.result: SPT J0417是动力学松弛的冷核系统，具有典型的冷核团参数（中心密度0.08 cm^{-3}，中心伪熵26 keVcm^{2}，冷却时间515 Myr）。但最亮团星系没有近期恒星形成证据，恒星主要在z~1.25形成，过去~3 Gyr无显著恒星形成，也没有强AGN活动。
AI.conclusion: SPT J0417代表了冷却和恒星形成几乎完全被抑制的大质量松弛冷核团，为理解AGN反馈如何调节星系团内介质的长期热平衡提供了重要见解。
